headline: Gold prices today, Tuesday, June 30: Hanging just above $4,000, but ready to rise?

headline: Chip Stocks’ Best Quarter Ever Is Ending With Some Wild Swings
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Chip stocks are heading for their best quarter ever, extending an extraordinary start to the year driven by insatiable demand for artificial intelligence equipment. headline: Goldman Sachs (GS) Leaves Russell Growth Indexes For Value And Defensive Benchmarks
summary: Goldman Sachs Group (NYSE:GS) has been reclassified in major Russell indices, moving out of several growth benchmarks into value and defensive categories. The company was removed from the Russell 1000, 3000, 3000E, and Top 200 Growth indices and added to the Russell 1000 Value-Defensive and Russell 1000 Defensive indices. This index reshuffle may influence how passive and institutional investors treat the stock and could alter its role in portfolios focused on growth versus value and...
